MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS INTERNET BUSINESS SKILLS, INC. AND ALLISON HARTSOE'S (AMENDED) MOTION FOR ORDER SETTING ASIDE AND VACATING DEFAULT JUDGMENT (REQUEST FOR MANDATORY RELIEF PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 473(B)).
APPEARANCES: PHILIP R. GREEN, ESQUIRE (GREEN & GREEN, 415.457.8300) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DAVID NIED, ESQUIRE AND JONATHAN GREGORY, ESQUIRE (CHAPMAN POPIK & WHITE, 415.352.3000) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT CONTINUES THE MATTER TO JULY 10, 2008, AT WHICH TIME THE MATTER WILL BE DEEMED SUBMITTED. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT FURTHER BRIEFING BY THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS ON JUNE 27, 2008. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT OPPOSITION BY THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS ON JULY 10, 2008.
